intended_use_full: The Assert-IQ™ ICM is indicated for the monitoring and diagnostic evaluation of patients who experience unexplained symptoms that may be cardiac-related such as: dizziness, palpitations, chest pain, syncope, and shortness of breath, as well as patients who are at risk for cardiac arrhythmias such as bradycardia, tachycardia, and sinus pause. The Assert-IQ™ ICM is also indicated for patients who have been previously diagnosed with atrial fibrillation (AF) or who are susceptible to developing AF.
target_condition: Unexplained cardiac symptoms (dizziness, palpitations, chest pain, syncope, shortness of breath) and cardiac arrhythmias (bradycardia, tachycardia, sinus pause, atrial fibrillation)
